system_prompt: You are an expert at extracting structured information from customer-facing documents. Extract the requested fields accurately and concisely. Respond with valid JSON only — no markdown fences, no commentary.
user_prompt_prefix: Extract the following fields from this document and return a JSON object with exactly these keys:

fields.company_name: The name of the customer company
fields.executive_summary: A 2-3 sentence summary of the customer's main challenge or goal
fields.key_challenges: Bullet-point list of the top 3-5 challenges the customer faces
fields.proposed_solution: The proposed solution or recommendation in 2-3 sentences
fields.expected_outcomes: Bullet-point list of expected business outcomes or benefits
fields.next_steps: Recommended next steps or call to action
